channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Unions Propose Charging Non-Members for Pay Increases and Removing Strike Limits
item.description: The Australian Manufacturing Workers Union has released a Blueprint for Action ahead of the Labor party's national conference, calling for the Albanese government to address the issue of 'free riders'...

item.title: Singer Bahati Faces Legal Claims Over Alleged Organ Harvesting Accusations
item.description: A young man from Pastor Ezekiel's congregation accused singer Kevin Bahati of running an organ harvesting operation across four Kenyan counties. The claim alleges victims were taken to hospitals, had ...

item.title: Roblox Introduces AI-Powered Game Creation Tool for Mobile Users
item.description: Roblox has announced a new feature called 'Build' that allows users to create games via text prompts on their mobile devices. This tool leverages both open-source and proprietary AI models to generate...

item.title: Toaster Oven Recall Warns of Electric Shock Risk
item.description: The Canadian government has issued a recall for a specific model of toaster oven due to a significant risk of electric shock. The recall, announced by the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC), af...

item.title: Congress and DMK Disagreement Over Delimitation Bill and Alliance Possibility
item.description: The article discusses the political tensions between the Congress party and the DMK as they navigate the delimitation bill. Congress leader Jairam Ramesh has dismissed rumors of an alliance between BJ...

item.title: Algeria donates educational resources to Zanzibar school, strengthening Pan-African ties
item.description: Algeria has donated over nine tonnes of educational equipment worth $600,000 to Ahmed Ben Bella Secondary School in Zanzibar, reinforcing historical ties between Tanzania and Algeria. The donation, ha...

item.title: Metropolitan launches No-Lapse Funeral Growth Plan to help South Africans with irregular incomes keep their funeral cover
item.description: This sponsored article introduces Metropolitan's new No-Lapse Funeral Growth Plan, a funeral insurance product aimed at South Africans whose incomes fluctuate because of informal, seasonal or gig-base...

item.title: Anya Taylor-Joy and Drew Starkey's Hollywood Journey and Career Success
item.description: The article explores the careers of renowned actors Anya Taylor-Joy and Drew Starkey, highlighting their paths to success in Hollywood. It discusses their breakthrough roles, notable projects, and the...

item.title: Cosmetic Surgery Risks in Central Asia Due to Poor Regulation
item.description: The article highlights the growing dangers of cosmetic surgery in Central Asia, where unregulated practices, expired medicines, and unqualified practitioners are leading to severe complications. Patie...

item.title: Andy Burnham's Manchesterism and Regional Development Strategies for the UK
item.description: The article explores Andy Burnham's political vision, known as 'Manchesterism,' which emphasizes regional development, devolution of powers, and systemic reforms to address economic disparities in the...

item.title: Telstra acknowledges preventable nationwide network failure impacting emergency services
item.description: Telstra's management has acknowledged that a nationwide network outage affecting critical services, including emergency response systems, could have been prevented. The incident, which disrupted Tripl...

item.title: Google Expands AI Video Creation Tools with Custom Avatars and Enhanced Editing Features
item.description: Google has announced significant updates to its Google Vids platform, transforming it into a comprehensive AI video creation tool. The update allows users to create personalized digital avatars that m...

item.title: Delhi Police Charge Ex-Domestic Help with Rape and Murder of IRS Officer's Daughter
item.description: The Delhi Police has filed a 973-page chargesheet against Rahul Meena, a former domestic help accused of raping and murdering a 22-year-old daughter of a senior IRS officer. According to the charge sh...

item.title: Former envoy Sanjay Verma says US indictment does not link India to Nijjar killing and reiterates concerns over Khalistani extremism
item.description: Former Indian High Commissioner to Canada Sanjay Verma has reiterated India's long-standing position that allegations linking the Indian government to the killing of Hardeep Singh Nijjar were unsuppor...

item.title: Canada and U.S. finalize toll revenue split for Gordie Howe bridge after political negotiations
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney faced scrutiny over the financial terms of the Gordie Howe International Bridge agreement with the United States. The bridge, connecting Windsor, Ontario, to Detroit, was fi...

item.title: South African 15-year-old London Remley set to compete in U16 Water Polo Championships
item.description: London Remley, a 15-year-old Grade 10 pupil at Reddam House Umhlanga, has been selected to represent South Africa at the World Aquatics Women’s U16 Water Polo Championships in Zagreb, Croatia. The you...

item.title: Pakistan Meteorological Department Warns of Continued Rain and Thunderstorms Until July 25
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a weather advisory predicting widespread rain, windstorms, and thundershowers across various regions of Pakistan until July 25. The forecast is ...

item.title: Maharashtra FDA Commissioner Tukaram Mundhe Launches Crackdown on Food Adulteration
item.description: IAS officer Tukaram Mundhe, who took charge as Maharashtra's FDA commissioner in May 2026, has intensified food safety raids across the state. Since his appointment, authorities have conducted inspect...

item.title: Mt Kenya Leaders Announce Political Move Following Ol Kalou By-Election Loss
item.description: The article discusses the political developments in Mt Kenya region following the UDA's significant defeat in the Ol Kalou parliamentary by-election. Mathira MP Eric Wamumbi revealed that leaders alli...

item.title: Celebrate Filipino Culture with Jodi, Diether, Vhong, and More
item.description: The article highlights ABS-CBN's Throwback campaign, which celebrates the 'Jologs' phenomenon—a cultural movement in the Philippines where people embrace their youthful, carefree days. It features col...
